title: manilkara zenkeri
intro: Manilkara zenkeri, also known as African cherry or bush cherry, is a plant species that belongs to the Sapotaceae family. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly its bark, which contains anthraquinones and tannins that have been used to treat various health conditions. Some of the health benefits associated with Manilkara zenkeri include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. The plant is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, which can be used to treat various ailments, including fever, diarrhea, and respiratory issues.
